title: Convergence rate for random walk approximations of mean field BSDEs
snippet: We study the rate of convergence w.r.t. a Wasserstein type distance for random walk approximation of mean field BSDEs. This article continuous [Briand et al., Donsker-Type Theorem For BSDEs: Rate of Convergence, Bernoulli, 2021], where the rate of convergence of a Donsker-type theorem for standard BSDEs is studied.
